# Foundations and Application of Generative AI

Course code: CITHN2014
Semester: Winter Semester 2025/26
Institution: Technical University of Munich

This is a public overview site for the course. It includes public-safe summaries of curriculum, projects, guest lectures, assessment, team information, and FAQ. It does not publish internal slides, assignments, or Moodle files.

## Primary pages
- Home: /
- Curriculum: /curriculum
- Insights: /insights
- Projects: /projects
- Team: /team
- Resources: /resources

## Official sources
- TUM course page: https://campus.tum.de/tumonline/ee/ui/ca2/app/desktop/#/slc.tm.cp/student/courses/950841084?$ctx=lang=EN&$scrollTo=toc_overview
- Moodle page: https://www.moodle.tum.de/course/view.php?id=111664
